task_completion.description: Delete the default 'Amateur' module in GPredict.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Amateur' tab is no longer visible in the main GPredict window.

task_completion.description: Create a new module named 'Crewed_Stations' containing ISS and CSS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tab or module window named 'Crewed_Stations' is visible, and its satellite list or map displays ISS (ZARYA) (NORAD 25544) and CSS (TIANHE) (NORAD 48274).

task_completion.description: Create a new module named 'Polar_Weather' containing NOAA 19, SUOMI NPP, and FENGYUN 3B.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tab or module window named 'Polar_Weather' is visible, and its satellite list or map displays NOAA 19 (NORAD 33591), SUOMI NPP (NORAD 37849), and FENGYUN 3B (NORAD 37214).

task_completion.description: Add a ground station named 'MIT' with the specified coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Edit Ground Station' dialog or ground station list shows a station named 'MIT' with Latitude 42.3601 (N), Longitude -71.0942 (or 71.0942 W), and Altitude 12m.

task_completion.description: Set the minimum elevation angle for pass predictions to 10 degrees.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GPredict Preferences window (under Predict or similar tab) shows the 'Minimum elevation' setting configured to 10 degrees.

task_completion.description: Configure the display to show UTC time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main GPredict window clock displays 'UTC' instead of local time, or the Preferences window shows the time format explicitly set to UTC.

integrity.description: The agent used the GPredict GUI to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show GPredict dialog boxes (Preferences, Module configuration, Ground Station configuration) being interacted with, rather than a terminal window editing configuration files directly.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual GPredict application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The GPredict application window is visible and active, not a mockup, browser search, or a text document.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply write the expected configuration into a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The changes are reflected in the native GPredict interface (tabs, lists, clocks, settings windows) and not just typed out in a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verify the following exact values: 'Crewed_Stations' must contain NORAD IDs 25544 (ISS) and 48274 (CSS). 'Polar_Weather' must contain NORAD IDs 33591 (NOAA 19), 37849 (SUOMI NPP), and 37214 (FENGYUN 3B). MIT ground station coordinates: Latitude 42.3601 N, Longitude 71.0942 W (or -71.0942), Altitude 12 meters. Minimum elevation angle for predictions: 10 degrees. Time display: UTC.
